have hH2 : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) H₂ := H₂_holo'
  have hH4 : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) H₄ := H₄_holo'
  have hH2sq : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ ^ 2) := by
    simpa using (hH2.pow 2)
  have hH2cb : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ ^ 3) := by
    simpa using (hH2.pow 3)
  have hH4sq : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₄ ^ 2) := by
    simpa using (hH4.pow 2)
  have hH2H4 : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (H₂ * H₄) := by
    exact MDifferentiable.mul hH2 hH4
  have h2H2sq : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (2 * H₂ ^ 2) := by
    simpa [two_mul] using (hH2sq.const_mul 2)
  have h5H2H4 : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (5 * (H₂ * H₄)) := by
    simpa [five_mul] using (hH2H4.const_mul 5)
  have h5H4sq : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (5 * H₄ ^ 2) := by
    simpa [five_mul] using (hH4sq.const_mul 5)
  have hpar : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (2 * H₂ ^ 2 + 5 * H₂ * H₄ + 5 * H₄ ^ 2) := by
    have : MDifferentiable 𝓘(ℂ) 𝓘(ℂ) (2 * H₂ ^ 2 + 5 * (H₂ * H₄)) :=
      MDifferentiable.add h2H2sq h5H2H4
    simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using
      (MDifferentiable.add this h5H4sq)
  rw [G]
  exact MDifferentiable.mul hH2cb hpar
